content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally with Realty (+2.18%), Metal (+0.91%), Pharma (+0.90%), Energy (+0.55%) leading. Nifty +0.44% holding above 24,000. VIX at 18.41 elevated but stable. Election-result tailwind plus strong Q4 earnings (BHEL, ADANIPORTS, BANDHANBNK, LAURUSLABS, RRKABEL) supporting risk-on. IT weak (-0.84%) the lone drag.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24000,
      "nifty_resistance": 24300
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1033,
      "new_target": 1110,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +6.2% on strong Q4 print (PAT +19% YoY, GNPA <1%). CMP 1044, currently SL 1030 (~1.4% below CMP). Trailing SL up to 1033 (just above pivot 1044's S1 at 1033) keeps ~1% gap below CMP, locking in ~5% gain while letting trend run toward 1110 target. Move is meaningful (+0.3%) and respects 0.5% gap rule (1044-1033=11 = 1.05% below CMP)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Defensive position -2.3%. SL 119 sits ~2.6% below CMP 122.26, well within tolerance. Gold structural thesis intact (CB buying, $4,000+ targets); current weakness is profit-taking off recent highs. No trail justified at unrealized loss."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 23.75,
      "new_target": 25.20,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Currently SL 23.70 is BELOW entry 23.65 by 0.05 — actually SL is essentially at breakeven minus. CMP 24.00, P&L +1.6%. Tightening SL to 23.75 (above breakeven) locks in tiny gain. Gap to CMP: 1.05% — respects 0.5% gap rule. Pharma sector momentum intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1710,
      "new_target": 1790,
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.6%, CMP 1728, near 52w high after Q4 beat (FY26 rev +25%, EBITDA +20%, Jefferies upgrade). Stored SL 1715 already above entry (1700). Trail up modestly to 1710 — wait, that LOOSENS. Stored SL 1715 must be tightened: new SL 1710 is BELOW 1715, would be REJECTED. Correcting: keep SL 1715 (already above entry, locks +0.9%); no trail needed since 1715 is 0.75% below CMP 1728 — within trail-gap discipline. HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GESHIP",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.8%, CMP 1530.80. Stock gapped to 52w-high 1600 then faded sharply on 4.2x volume — distribution candle. SL 1510 is 1.4% below CMP, intact. Board meeting May 14 for Q4 results is a binary catalyst — if held, will need pre-event de-risking decision next week. Today: HOLD, monitor."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -1.9%, CMP 13500. Q4 PAT -6.9% YoY (margin pressure) but record monthly volumes and Rs 14,000 cr capex thesis intact. Intraday weakness from gap-up high 13976 → 13500 is profit-taking. SL 13400 is ~0.7% below CMP — narrow but respects original risk plan. HOLD; if SL hit, exit clean."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -1.2%, CMP 205.95. Strong Q4 print (PAT +68% YoY), 8.2x volume surge today (intraday spike to 212.66 then faded). Multiple broker upgrades. SL 204 is 0.95% below CMP — too tight given 8% intraday range, but tightening further would invite stopout on noise. HOLD; thesis intact, give it room."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.1% (~breakeven), CMP 4549. Up 31% in a month, defence tailwind, Citi target 5560, F414 deal progressing. Stock spiked intraday to 4590 then mild fade to 4549. SL 4480 is 1.5% below CMP. Q4 results late May. HOLD; trail later if move extends."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ANANTRAJ",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 504,
      "new_target": 540,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +0.7%, CMP 508.50. Realty sector top performer +2.18%. Tightening SL from 502 to 504 (above entry 506? No, 504 is below 506 entry, but above prior SL 502). Move is +0.4% — borderline micro-adjust but moves SL above key support 502→504 (above S1 502.70). Gap to CMP: 0.88% — respects rule. Board meeting May 11 (Q4) is binary — will need decision next week."
    },
    {
      "action": "EXIT",
      "symbol": "EXIDEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 130,
      "order_type": "MARKET",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -2.6%, CMP 359.40, SL 365 essentially at-the-money already breached intraday (low 354.20). Board meeting TODAY for Q4/FY26 results — binary event risk hours away. Per Rule 11 (binary-event discipline), default disposition is exit/trim. Stock already showing pre-result jitter (369 → 354 = -4% intraday). Exit clean before result print rather than holding 6.5% position into binary."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 0,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 0,
      "confidence": 0.0,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Skip — already held at full position. No add."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1033,
      "reasoning": "Lock ~5% of 6.2% gain with SL just above S1 1033."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hold; SL 119 has room."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 23.75,
      "reasoning": "Move SL above entry to lock breakeven+."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1715 already above entry 1700, locking +0.9%. Within 0.75% of CMP — adequate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GESHIP",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Distribution candle today; monitor. SL 1510 has room. May 14 board meeting will require pre-event decision."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 13400 tight but respects original plan."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4 + volume; give it room past today's wide range."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defence rally; SL 4480 sufficient."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ANANTRAJ",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 504,
      "reasoning": "Tighten above support; manage into May 11 results."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "EXIDEIND",
      "current_action": "EXIT",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 board meeting today — binary event, exit before close."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "RRKABEL (+8% on huge volume, FY26 PAT +57%) and HAL/CESC remain interesting but cluster discipline (already hold HAL in defence/capgds; ANANTRAJ in realty) caps further additions. CESC Q4 result on May 6 (binary) — not a fresh-entry candidate. SUNPHARMA: large-cap defensive but Organon leverage overhang and 5.6% off ATH — wait for pullback. LAURUSLABS at fresh 52w high after strong Q4 — would chase here; prefer pullback to 1130-1140 zone.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is well-deployed at 52% with 10 names; cluster exposures balanced (1 housing-fin, 1 bank, 1 auto, 1 ports, 1 shipping, 1 realty, 1 defence, 1 auto-component, 2 ETFs). After EXIDEIND exit, will free ~₹47k cash and remove the immediate binary risk. Upcoming binary calendar to manage proactively: ANANTRAJ May 11, GESHIP May 14, SUNPHARMA May 21 (not held). No new entries today — quality of audit + EXIDEIND risk-off is the right use of decision slots. Trades today: 19 already; restraint warranted."
}
